tagline: A curated reference of 300 essential contractor tools across six trades.

tools.name: Procore
tools.description: An all-in-one construction management software needed for improving communication and project tracking.

tools.name: Buildertrend
tools.description: Essential for residential builders to centralize scheduling, financial tracking, and client communication.

tools.name: Jobber
tools.description: Needed for streamlining field service work, scheduling, dispatching, and invoicing.

tools.name: ServiceTitan
tools.description: A powerhouse needed to streamline dispatching, automate marketing, and provide robust financial reporting.

tools.name: Contractor Foreman
tools.description: Needed by small trade contractors wanting enterprise project management features affordably.

tools.name: Houzz Pro
tools.description: Needed to manage inbound leads, create 3D floor plans, and handle visual estimates.

tools.name: CoConstruct
tools.description: Needed by custom builders to handle lead tracking, warranty management, and client selections.

tools.name: FieldEdge
tools.description: Needed to connect field service operations, syncing dispatching directly with QuickBooks.

tools.name: PlanGrid
tools.description: Needed so field teams can access blueprints, track issues, and mark up plans offline.

tools.name: AutoCAD
tools.description: The standard needed for creating precise 2D and 3D floor plans and construction documents.

tools.name: QuickBooks Online
tools.description: Needed for essential bookkeeping, invoicing, and expense tracking for contractor businesses.

tools.name: CompanyCam
tools.description: Needed for photo documentation, allowing contractors to snap, organize, and share jobsite photos.

tools.name: ClockShark

tools.name: Gusto
tools.description: Needed for seamless payroll processing, benefits management, and HR for construction teams.

tools.name: Samsara
tools.description: Needed for fleet tracking and telematics to monitor vehicle health and driver safety.

tools.name: ToolWatch

tools.name: Bluebeam Revu

tools.name: Monday.com

tools.name: Asana
tools.description: Needed for internal task management and marketing campaign tracking.

tools.name: Raken
